complete_user_guide/features/create_prod.本页说明如何通过 **自动编程向导** 完整创建一个新的 PCBA 产品，涵盖基: This page walks through creating a new PCBA product end-to-end using the **Auto-Programming wizard** — basic info, conveyor placement, PCB dimensions, and the full-board capture.
complete_user_guide/features/create_prod.在主页点击 **训练PCBA** 按钮，进入 **自动编程向导**。向导将自动停: Click **Train PCBA** on the home page to open the **Auto-Programming wizard**. It opens on step 1 — **Basic Info**.
complete_user_guide/features/create_prod.自动编程向导需要一次完成。如果在中途退出，则无法重新回到之前的步骤。如果不小心中: The Auto-Programming wizard must be completed in one pass. There is no way to resume a partially-finished wizard. If you exit by accident, delete the half-finished product and start a new one.
complete_user_guide/features/create_prod.**产品名称** — 在输入框中输入唯一的产品名称。若名称已存在，系统将提示\": **Product Name** — enter a unique product name. If the name already exists, the system returns *Name duplicated* and you must change it.
complete_user_guide/features/create_prod.**标签** — 在下拉选择框中选择或输入标签，可用于对产品分类管理；多个标签以: **Tags** — pick or type tags from the drop-down to categorize the product; comma-separated for multiple tags.
complete_user_guide/features/create_prod.**自动编程检测类型：** — 勾选需要 AI 自动生成 ROI 的检测类型。每: **Auto-Programming inspection types** — check the inspection types you want the AI to auto-generate ROIs for. Each type can be expanded to pick specific package sub-classes.
complete_user_guide/features/create_prod.**本体** — 检测元件是否贴装在位（本体检测）。: **Body** — detects whether the component is mounted in place (body inspection).
complete_user_guide/features/create_prod.**焊点** — 检测焊点质量（润湿、偏移等）。: **Solder Joint** — assesses solder-joint quality (wetting, offset, and so on).
complete_user_guide/features/create_prod.**IC引脚** — 检测 IC 引脚状态（翘脚、桥连、缺失等），适用于 SOI: **IC Lead** — inspects IC lead condition (lifted leads, bridges, missing leads, and so on); used for fine-pitch packages such as SOIC / SOP / QFP.
complete_user_guide/features/create_prod.**焊盘沾胶** — 检测焊盘上的红胶污染。: **Glue on Pad** — detects red-glue contamination on solder pads.
complete_user_guide/features/create_prod.**元件本体颜色** — 检测元件本体颜色，适用于 CRM、LED 等有颜色要求: **Body Color** — checks the component body color; used for parts with color requirements such as CRM and LED.
complete_user_guide/features/create_prod.**DIP** — 检测波峰焊后的 DIP 焊点，包含炉后（dip_solder: **DIP** — inspects DIP solder joints after wave soldering; covers both post-wave (``dip_solder``) and pre-wave (``dip_pin``) sub-classes.
complete_user_guide/features/create_prod.不同类型的封装可展开勾选，例如\"本体\"类型下包含 Capacitor、Res: Each type expands to package-level checkboxes — for example, **Body** covers Capacitor, Resistor, LED, QFP, and others. **DIP** is off by default and must be enabled explicitly.
complete_user_guide/features/create_prod.**自动编程参数** — 根据已勾选的检测类型，展开对应的参数配置（仅当对应类型: **Auto-Programming parameters** — show the parameter block for each enabled type (only visible when the corresponding type is on):
complete_user_guide/features/create_prod.**DIP 参数** （DIP 检测启用时显示）：: **DIP parameters** (shown when DIP inspection is enabled):
complete_user_guide/features/create_prod.**邻近距离 (像素)** — DIP 焊点间邻近距离阈值（像素），用于判断相邻: **Adjacency distance (pixels)** — adjacency threshold between DIP joints (in pixels), used to decide which joints group together.
complete_user_guide/features/create_prod.**ROI 扩展 (%)** — DIP ROI 的边缘向外扩展比例。: **ROI expansion (%)** — outward edge expansion ratio for the DIP ROI.
complete_user_guide/features/create_prod.**桥接** — 勾选复选框以启用桥接检测；取消勾选则禁用。: **Bridge** — check the box to enable bridge inspection; uncheck to disable.
complete_user_guide/features/create_prod.**邻近距离 (像素)** — 桥接检测的邻近距离阈值（像素）；禁用时不可编辑。: **Adjacency distance (pixels)** — adjacency threshold for bridge detection (in pixels); not editable when disabled.
complete_user_guide/features/create_prod.**焊盘沾胶参数** （焊盘沾胶检测启用时显示）：: **Glue-on-Pad parameters** (shown when Glue-on-Pad inspection is enabled):
complete_user_guide/features/create_prod.**ROI 扩展 (%)** — 焊盘沾胶 ROI 的边缘扩展比例，支持负值（缩: **ROI expansion (%)** — edge expansion ratio for the Glue-on-Pad ROI; negative values shrink the ROI.
complete_user_guide/features/create_prod.**元件本体颜色参数** （元件本体颜色检测启用时显示）：: **Body Color parameters** (shown when Body Color inspection is enabled):
complete_user_guide/features/create_prod.**本体 ROI 面积 (%)** — 元件本体颜色 ROI 占本体区域的面积比: **Body ROI area (%)** — proportion of the body region used by the Body Color ROI.
complete_user_guide/features/create_prod.**健康检查** — 设置自动编程完成后的质量验证选项：: **Health checks** — quality-verification options that run after Auto-Programming finishes:
complete_user_guide/features/create_prod.**数量检查** — 校验每个元件是否具有期望数量的焊点及 IC 引脚；有 CA: **Count check** — verifies that every component carries the expected number of solder joints and IC leads. When CAD package data is available, lead counts are matched per package.
complete_user_guide/features/create_prod.**质量检查** — 校验焊点对称性、IC 引脚一致性及排阻引脚覆盖率。: **Quality check** — verifies solder-joint symmetry, IC lead consistency, and resistor-array lead coverage.
complete_user_guide/features/create_prod.完成 **基本信息** 步骤后，点击 **下一步** 继续以下步骤。: Once **Basic Info** is complete, click **Next** to continue.
complete_user_guide/features/create_prod.自动编程向导基本信息步骤：产品名称、标签、检测类型、自动编程参数、健康检查: Auto-Programming wizard Basic Info step: product name, tags, inspection types, Auto-Programming parameters, and health checks.
complete_user_guide/features/create_prod.**第二步：放置 PCB 与锁定传送带**: **Step 2: Place the PCB and lock the conveyor**
complete_user_guide/features/create_prod.将 PCB 平整放置于传送带中央，选择传送带并点击\"锁定\"。确认或输入传送带: Place the PCB flat in the center of the conveyor, select the conveyor, and click **Lock**. Confirm or enter the conveyor width, click **PCB In**, wait for the board to advance into the capture area, then click **Next**.
complete_user_guide/features/create_prod.将 PCB 放在传送带上示意: Placing the PCB on the conveyor
complete_user_guide/features/create_prod.若已知 PCB 尺寸，直接输入宽、高（mm）。: If you know the PCB dimensions, enter width and height (mm) directly.
complete_user_guide/features/create_prod.若未知：仅调整相机 X/Y（Z 保持不变）分别拍摄左下与右上；点击\"选择像素\: If unknown, move the camera only in X and Y (leave Z unchanged) and capture the bottom-left and top-right corners separately. Click **Select Pixel**, click the PCB's bottom-left and top-right pixels in turn, then click **Auto-calculate**; the system infers the dimensions for the subsequent full capture.
complete_user_guide/features/create_prod.点击\"拍摄\"后系统联动相机与传送带分区采集并拼接生成完整 PCB 图像。随后: Click **Capture**; the system coordinates the camera and conveyor to acquire the board in tiles and stitch the full PCB image. Then click **Define Region** to box the effective area (usually the entire board; shrink the box if fixture edges should be excluded). Always use a clean, defect-free **Golden board**. Camera parameters — **Exposure**, **Gain**, **gamma** — can be tuned on this screen and the capture re-run if needed.
complete_user_guide/features/create_prod.相机参数会随产品一同创建，并在检测时沿用同一组参数采集，确保编程图像与检测图像一: Camera parameters are saved with the product and reused at inspection time, so the programming image and the inspection image stay consistent. If the result isn't acceptable, re-capture to overwrite the prior version.
complete_user_guide/features/create_prod.绝大多数情况下，只需调整 **曝光时间** 让图像亮度合适即可；**增益** 与: In most cases just tune **Exposure** to set image brightness. **Gain** and **gamma** are reserved for fine-tuning color or shadow detail — leave them alone unless you have to.
complete_user_guide/features/create_prod.完成后会进入产品编程选项界面，从这一步开始，可以分为全自动编程、半自动编程和手动: Once complete, the wizard hands off to the programming options page; from there you can choose Full Auto-Programming, Semi-Auto Programming, or Manual Programming. See :doc:`auto_programming`.
complete_user_guide/features/create_prod.SOIC / SOP / TSOP / TSSOP / MSOP（细间距：检测翘: SOIC / SOP / TSOP / TSSOP / MSOP (fine pitch: lifted leads, missing or short leads, bridges, deformation)
complete_user_guide/features/create_prod.QFP（四边引脚：翘起、桥连、缺失、偏移、脚形不规则）: QFP (four-sided leads: lifted leads, bridges, missing leads, offset, irregular lead shape)
complete_user_guide/features/create_prod.TO-263 / TO-252（大功率引脚与散热焊盘）: TO-263 / TO-252 (high-power leads and thermal pad)
complete_user_guide/features/create_prod.QFN（型号/批次丝印，低对比度需适当增亮）: QFN (model / batch silkscreen; brighten when contrast is low)
complete_user_guide/features/create_prod.**产品名称必须唯一**：重复名称将导致创建失败，需修改后重试。: **Product name must be unique**: a duplicate name fails creation; change it and retry.
complete_user_guide/features/create_prod.**向导不支持断点续建**：若中途退出向导，无法返回之前的步骤。请删除未完成的产: **The wizard does not support resume-from-checkpoint**: exiting partway through means you cannot return to earlier steps. Delete the half-finished product and start again.
complete_user_guide/features/create_prod.**DIP 检测默认关闭**：需手动在 **自动编程检测类型：** 中展开并勾选: **DIP inspection is off by default**: expand **Auto-Programming inspection types**, check a DIP sub-class (pre-wave or post-wave) and the DIP parameter block activates.
complete_user_guide/features/create_prod.**桥接检测默认关闭**：勾选 **桥接** 复选框后，**邻近距离 (像素)*: **Bridge inspection is off by default**: once you check **Bridge**, **Adjacency distance (pixels)** becomes editable. The default is 0 (disabled).
complete_user_guide/features/create_prod.**健康检查建议保持开启**：两项健康检查（数量检查、质量检查）默认开启，可帮助: **Keep health checks on**: both Count check and Quality check are on by default and help verify ROI quality after Auto-Programming.
complete_user_guide/features/create_prod.**创建产品常见问题与排查**: **Common questions and troubleshooting when creating a product**
complete_user_guide/features/create_prod.**完整拍摄图像拼接异常**：检查 PCB 在采集过程中是否发生移动/震动；若确: **Full-capture image shows stitching artifacts**: check whether the PCB shifted or vibrated during capture. If the board was stable, the camera calibration may have drifted — run :ref:`相机现场校准` and re-capture.
complete_user_guide/features/create_prod.**创建产品提示\"传送带占用\"**：确认是否有正在运行的检测任务或未释放的产: **Create-Product reports "conveyor in use"**: check for a running inspection session or a product lock that wasn't released. If nothing is running and it still reports the conveyor as in use, restart the software to refresh state.
complete_user_guide/features/create_prod.**退出向导后无法回到中途步骤**：当前版本不支持断点续建，只能删除该未完成产品: **Exiting the wizard leaves no way back to an intermediate step**: resume is not supported in this release — delete the half-finished product and start over.
complete_user_guide/features/create_prod.:doc:`auto_programming` — CAD 上传与自动编程步骤（: :doc:`auto_programming` — CAD upload and Auto-Programming steps (Full Auto / Semi-Auto / Manual)
